description: CompositionWhite printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, chest placket, pin-tucks around the neckline, has lace and contrast piping on the front,long sleeves with pin-tucks and piping on the cuffs and has a curved hemFitRegularWash careWash separately in cold waterDo not bleachDry in shadeMedium to hot ironThere's a bright, gypsy style fabric pattern trending in fashion circuits at the moment which is already selling like hot cakes on myntra - so you'll stay in trend when you wear this biba kurta. Fashioned to please your colour fetish, this piece can be styled with colourful capris or conservative leggings.Model statisticsThe product is a size 38 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
